name: Megan West, My Faith Votes
subject: More My Faith Matters LIVE in 2017
body:
My Faith Matters More Than Ever!

View this email in your browser

Dear Peter,

As the host of My Faith Matters LIVE, it has
been my privilege in 2016 to have you join me in conversations
about the power of faith with incredible people who are making a
difference in the world, like:

Ben Carson
Kirk Cameron
The Kendrick Brothers
David Barton
Rev. Samuel Rodriguez

Phil Robertson
Eric Metaxas
Laura Ingraham
Bishop E.W. Jackson
Dr. David Jeremiah

These shows are making a difference because
they are built on two very simple premises - first, our faith
matters, and second, conversation is essential for any meaningful
change.

In 2016, My Faith Votes also brought you
access to several powerful, live events - Kirk Cameron's Revive
US in theaters across the nation, World Outreach Church's Give
Thanks at Bridgestone Arena, and Q Commons - that celebrated
God's faithfulness and challenged us to think well and pursue
good, even when the path is not clear.

Together, My Faith Votes is reaching millions
of Christians with a simple message to pray, think, and act in
order that our churches might be restored and God would be
honored in our nation.

All this was accomplished in a short
six-month period. But none of it would have happened without the
generous help of our supporters.

We have plans for many more My Faith Matters
LIVE events in 2017. Please help make this possible and provide
your year-end $20 tax deductible gift today!

Megan West
Host of My Faith Matters LIVE
Media Director, My Faith Votes

name: Donna Brazile
subject: We must rise.
body:
We're counting on Democrats to keep fighting
---
**This year is coming to an end, and we need to know you're committed to fighting back against the GOP and the Trump administration. Will you donate before our deadline tomorrow at midnight?

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c11a/4067b0a/22907c7f8/7e795980/2395353937/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20161230_db_nd&source=em_20161230_db_nd")**
2016 has been a tough year for the Democratic Party.

But with our end-of-year fundraising deadline on the horizon, we have an opportunity to finish this year on a positive note. Every penny we raise before the new year will put our party in a better position to elect Democrats all over the country and fight against what's coming from Donald Trump, his administration, and Congressional Republicans.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

**[QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c11a/4067b0a/22907c7f8/7e795981/2395353937/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20161230_db_nd&source=em_20161230_db_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c11a/4067b0a/22907c7f8/7e79598e/2395353937/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20161230_db_nd&source=em_20161230_db_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c11a/4067b0a/22907c7f8/7e79598f/2395353937/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20161230_db_nd&source=em_20161230_db_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c11a/4067b0a/22907c7f8/7e79598c/2395353937/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20161230_db_nd&source=em_20161230_db_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c11a/4067b0a/22907c7f8/7e79598d/2395353937/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20161230_db_nd&source=em_20161230_db_nd")**

**[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c11a/4067b0a/22907c7f8/7e79598a/2395353937/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20161230_db_nd&source=em_20161230_db_nd")**

** As I reflect on this year and our party, I can't help but think about one of my favorite Maya Angelou poems -- we've faced turmoil and tasted defeat, but we are not broken. And we can't sit around with our heads bowed and eyes lowered.

We must rise -- because when the final votes were tallied, we saw that more Americans believe in our values and ideals. So we have to stand strong for what we believe in -- now, next year, and every year afterward. Too many people are counting on Democrats for us to give up now.

**My hopes are still springing high. If yours are too, then pitch in $3 or whatever you can before tomorrow's end-of-year deadline:**

**[https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c11a/4067b0a/22907c7f8/7e79598b/2395353937/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+httpsmydemocratsorg2016Deadline&utm_campaign=em_20161230_db_nd&source=em_20161230_db_nd")**

Thanks so much -- and happy New Year to you and your family.

Donna

Donna Brazile
Chair
Democratic National Committee

body:
Mr. Trump has asked me to be your next RNC Chairman. |

Friend, President-elect Trump has personally asked me to run the RNC beginning in 2017. I wanted to reach out to you first because you’re listed as a loyal grassroots supporter who helped us win big last November. As a former Trump delegate and the Chairman of the Michigan GOP, I understand that grassroots leaders like you are the lifeblood of our Party. We won thanks to you. But the fight isn’t over, Friend. In fact, it’s never over. We can never sit back and get complacent because we won an election. We won because we never rested, we never gave up. Like me, you fought until the very end. And that’s the winning attitude I will bring to the RNC as your next chairman. But before I humbly accept the honor to serve our Party, I’m asking you to give us an early start on our 2017 investments by making an end-of-year contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, or $15 to the RNC. Winning the election was just step one. Now it’s time to get to work and support President-elect Trump’s America First agenda and rebuild our country. But if you think the mainstream media was rough on us during the election, just wait until Trump officially becomes our president. We will face a never-ending onslaught of lies, attacks, and dirty tactics intended to divide us and distort our message. Thanks to your support, we were able to deliver our message straight to the American voter. And it never would’ve happened without the RNC’s investments in top-notch voter data, digital marketing efforts, unbeatable ground game, and communications team that relentlessly held the media responsible. My plan is not to let up one, single inch. We will continue to grow the winning program you and Reince built over the last four years. But I will need your help sustaining it. Friend, 2017 will be one of the most exciting years of our lives as Americans. This year you got to see our Party win. But in 2017, you’re going to see your COUNTRY win again! Please make an end-of-year contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, or $15 before December 31 at 11:59 PM to help our Party keep winning. Thank you and God bless you, Ronna McDaniel

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Our movement
body:
What Bernie proved during his presidential campaign is when millions of people come together, we can accomplish things that no one ever thought possible.
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Once President-elect Trump takes office, we need to be ready to defend our progressive victories and respond to Republican attempts to jeopardize health care for millions of Americans, undo our progress on addressing climate change, and give tax breaks to the wealthy at the expense of working families.
What Bernie proved during his presidential campaign is when millions of people come together, we can accomplish things that no one ever thought possible. We have a lot of tough fights ahead of us, but we can win those fights if we do it together.
**Your small-dollar donations and dedication to the progressive values we share is what makes our work possible. You have been and continue to be the greatest strength of our organization and this movement.**
Our Revolution remains committed to empowering you to continue making progress in your community, and we've been working hard to develop comprehensive state-based organizing plans which take into account tens of thousands of survey responses.
Together we have already accomplished incredible feats, from stopping construction of the Dakota Access Pipeline to putting the nail in the coffin of the TPP. But we need your help now more than ever as we prepare for the release of the nationwide Our Revolution local organizing plans.
[**Contribute $3 right now, before tomorrow's end-of-year fundraising deadline, to support Our Revolution 's local organizing roll-out and help us continue carrying out the goals of our political revolution that brought us all together.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrev_political_revolution?refcode=em161230-v2-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrev_political_revolution?refcode=em161230-v2-a")
Since launching Our Revolution, we've shown what is possible when we come together to advance racial, social, economic and environmental justice.
**Last month, our political revolution defeated the Trans-Pacific Partnership.** This was a central issue during Bernie's presidential campaign, and our movement kept up the pressure until it was clear that this horrible trade deal would not come up for a vote during the lame duck session.
During the Democratic National Convention, more than 2,000 of us demonstrated in Philadelphia to show opposition to the TPP. And together we made more than 50,000 calls into Congress and sent 100,000 text messages to stop the TPP.
Earlier this month, we won a major victory in North Dakota when the government halted construction of the Dakota Access Pipeline. Native American activists and their allies joined together to stop this disastrous pipeline from contaminating tribal lands and water.
**Thanks to your support, Our Revolution raised more than $200,000 to support the Standing Rock Sioux Tribe and collected nearly 250,000 petition signatures to oppose construction of the pipeline.**
That is the political revolution -- when we stand together, we win.
[**Contribute $3 to Our Revolution before tomorrow's end-of-year fundraising deadline to help us continue the political revolution and make more victories like these possible.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrev_political_revolution?refcode=em161230-v2-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrev_political_revolution?refcode=em161230-v2-a")
Thank you for everything you've done, and will do, for our movement.
In solidarity,
Larry Cohen
Board Chair
Our Revolution
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrev_political_revolution?refcode=em161230-v2-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrev_political_revolution?refcode=em161230-v2-a")**

Our Revolution remains committed to empowering you to continue making progress in your community, and we've been working hard to develop comprehensive state-based organizing plans which take into account tens of thousands of survey responses. Together we have already accomplished incredible feats, from stopping construction of the Dakota Access Pipeline to putting the nail in the coffin of the TPP. But we need your help now more than ever as we prepare for the release of the nationwide Our Revolution local organizing plans. "" Since launching Our Revolution, we've shown what is possible when we come together to advance racial, social, economic and environmental justice. Last month, our political revolution defeated the Trans-Pacific Partnership. This was a central issue during Bernie's presidential campaign, and our movement kept up the pressure until it was clear that this horrible trade deal would not come up for a vote during the lame duck session. During the Democratic National Convention, more than 2,000 of us demonstrated in Philadelphia to show opposition to the TPP. And together we made more than 50,000 calls into Congress and sent 100,000 text messages to stop the TPP. Earlier this month, we won a major victory in North Dakota when the government halted construction of the Dakota Access Pipeline. Native American activists and their allies joined together to stop this disastrous pipeline from contaminating tribal lands and water. Thanks to your support, Our Revolution raised more than $200,000 to support the Standing Rock Sioux Tribe and collected nearly 250,000 petition signatures to oppose construction of the pipeline. That is the political revolution -- when we stand together, we win. "" Thank you for everything you've done, and will do, for our movement. In solidarity, Larry Cohen Board Chair Our Revolution "" PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION 603 2ND ST, NE WASHINGTON, DC, 20002 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. 603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002

name: Governor-elect Jim Justice
subject: Justice Inaugural Committee Launches Website
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice for WV
body:
Dear Friend:
Today, the inaugural committee for Governor-elect Jim Justice launched _[www.InaugurationWV.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7676731237619857408/6138268354022344704)_ to share information about the inaugural festivities.
[**_FOLLOW THIS LINK TO SEE THE FULL SCHEDULE FOR JIM 'S INAUGURATION._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7676731237619857408/6210325948060272640)
Visit the new website to get information for the Governor-elect's inauguration on January 16, 2017 at the state capitol and the inaugural ball taking place at The Greenbrier that evening.
West Virginians can buy individual tickets for the ball online starting January 5.
**Schedule for January 16, 2017:**
**1:00PM -- INAUGURAL CEREMONY AT THE CAPITOL**
Governor-elect Justice will take the oath of office on South Plaza of the West Virginia State Capitol. [For more information on the ceremony, including parking, follow this link.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7676731237619857408/6282383542098200576)
**IMMEDIATELY FOLLOWING CEREMONY**
**_Receiving Line_**
Immediately following the ceremony, the Governor and First Lady, will receive the public in the Lower Rotunda of the State Capitol. They will be joined by the Secretary of State, Attorney General, Treasurer, Auditor, and Commissioner of Agriculture to greet the public. [Click here for more information.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7676731237619857408/6354441136136128512)
**_Reception in honor of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr._**
At the conclusion of the ceremony there will be a Reception in honor of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. featuring live entertainment and light refreshments in the Great Hall of the West Virginia Culture Center immediately following the ceremony. [Find reception details here. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7676731237619857408/6426498730174056448)
**7:30PM -- INAUGURAL BALL AT THE GREENBRIER**
The inaugural ball is black tie optional and requires tickets. Individual tickets will go on sale January 5th. Entertainment for the evening will include a national headliner, Landau Eugene Murphy, Jr., Walter Scott Trio, The West Virginia Jazz Orchestra, The Richard Hefner Bluegrass Band, and River Jam. [Click here for details](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7676731237619857408/6498556324211984384).
If you want to be a sponsor of the Jim Justice inaugural ball, please email [inaugural@justiceforwv.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7676731237619857408/6570613918249912320)

Paid for by Justice for WV
---
Justice for WV
PO Box 40027
Charleston WV 25364 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7676731237619857408/6066210759984416768).

name: Al Franken
subject: Bright spot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Democrats can protect our progress and hold the line against Donald Trump, but we'll need everyone's help to do it... We've heard a lot about what Democrats should do next. I wanted to take a minute and talk about why that's important...
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161230-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend -- Election Night was a disappointment, but I am an optimist, and I believe there's hope to be found in even the darkest moments.

For example, maybe you met someone interesting at your Election Night party. Maybe you ordered some delicious Chinese food. Maybe you fell asleep before the returns came in and missed the whole thing.

Okay, I'm grasping at straws. But here's a real bright spot: **DSCC supporters like you helped accomplish some important things this year.**

You helped Tammy Duckworth and Maggie Hassan defeat Republican incumbents. Because of you, Catherine Cortez Masto became the first Latina to win a Senate race. We reelected every Democratic Senator on the ballot, and added powerful new voices like Kamala Harris and Chris Van Hollen. **Our new Senate will be the most diverse one ever -- and it 's all because of you.**

[**But I need you to stay in the fight, because we have a big job ahead. Will you pitch in and help support the DSCC before their year-end deadline?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161230-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Come January, the 48 of us in the Democratic caucus will be the last, best line of defense against Donald Trump's agenda. And we'll need you with us to protect the victories we've won under President Obama and hold the new administration accountable.

We're also going to need you with us in the next election. Republicans' top goal will be to break our blue line so that Trump can do whatever he wants. They'll have the map in their favor. They'll have big money on their side. And if you've noticed, some of them don't feel constrained by the need to tell the truth.

**That 's where you come in.** Even on a rough Election Night, DSCC supporters like you proved that you have what it takes to win tough fights. Now, I'm asking you to start proving it again.

**Democratic Senators will fight Trump every step of the way -- but we need you with us. Please pitch in to support us in the fights ahead!**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161230-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&employer=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161230-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&employer=&amount=15")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161230-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&employer=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161230-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&employer=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161230-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

I know you might be feeling down right now. But it's time to get up off the mat, throw away that leftover lo mein growing fuzz in the back of your fridge, and help us fight for the values we share.

Thanks,
Al Franken

P.S.: Make no mistake, holding the line against Donald Trump is going to take some hard work in the coming months. [**Will you pitch in today and help us get a running start?**](https://secure.dscc. clean_body: Democrats can protect our progress and hold the line against Donald Trump, but we'll need everyone's help to do it... We've heard a lot about what Democrats should do next. I wanted to take a minute and talk about why that's important... "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Friend -- Election Night was a disappointment, but I am an optimist, and I believe there's hope to be found in even the darkest moments. For example, maybe you met someone interesting at your Election Night party. Maybe you ordered some delicious Chinese food. Maybe you fell asleep before the returns came in and missed the whole thing. Okay, I'm grasping at straws. But here's a real bright spot: DSCC supporters like you helped accomplish some important things this year. You helped Tammy Duckworth and Maggie Hassan defeat Republican incumbents. Because of you, Catherine Cortez Masto became the first Latina to win a Senate race. We reelected every Democratic Senator on the ballot, and added powerful new voices like Kamala Harris and Chris Van Hollen. Our new Senate will be the most diverse one ever -- and it 's all because of you. "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Come January, the 48 of us in the Democratic caucus will be the last, best line of defense against Donald Trump's agenda. And we'll need you with us to protect the victories we've won under President Obama and hold the new administration accountable. We're also going to need you with us in the next election. Republicans' top goal will be to break our blue line so that Trump can do whatever he wants. They'll have the map in their favor. They'll have big money on their side. And if you've noticed, some of them don't feel constrained by the need to tell the truth. That 's where you come in. Even on a rough Election Night, DSCC supporters like you proved that you have what it takes to win tough fights. Now, I'm asking you to start proving it again. Democratic Senators will fight Trump every step of the way -- but we need you with us. Please pitch in to support us in the fights ahead! "" "" "" "" "" "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" I know you might be feeling down right now. Thanks, Al Franken P.S.: Make no mistake, holding the line against Donald Trump is going to take some hard work in the coming months.
